property_profile: compact recently refurbished UK rental flat
cleanliness: tidy with ordinary toiletries and dry surfaces
lighting: window backlight plus neutral ceiling light
continuity_requirements: same white suite, grey tiles, glass screen, towel rail and window positions across all four views
